raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 2021-22 budget allocates $5 million for the County of Orange for the Be Well OC Campus in Irvine.",
    "The budget includes $500 million to fund mitigation efforts to protect the California coast from sea-level rise.",
    "AB 65 prioritizes funds for the use of green, natural infrastructure to protect against rising seas without harming habitats.",
    "The budget makes an unprecedented investment of $21,000 per pupil, per year for K-12 students.",
    "There will be 200,000 new childcare slots created statewide as part of the budget.",
    "The budget includes a $3.7 billion investment in wildfire prevention, drought mitigation, and climate resiliency initiatives.",
    "$12 billion is allocated to combat homelessness, with strict accountability for the use of these funds.",
    "The budget provides $6 billion over three years for broadband infrastructure and improved access to services throughout the state.",
    "The budget allocates $1 billion for workforce development including training, education, and 'upskilling.'"
  ]
}
```
